2604.12254.title: SpanKey: Dynamic Key Space Conditioning for Neural Network Access Control
2604.12254.paper_summary: SpanKey is a lightweight way to gate inference without encrypting weights or chasing leaderboard accuracy on gated inference. The idea is to condition activations on secret keys. A basis matrix $B$ defines a low-dimensional key subspace $Span(B)$; during training we sample coefficients $α$ and form keys $k=α^\top B$, then inject them into intermediate activations with additive or multiplicative maps and strength $γ$. Valid keys lie in $Span(B)$; invalid keys are sampled outside that subspace. We make three points. (i) Mechanism: subspace key injection and a multi-layer design space. (ii) Failure mode: key absorption, together with two analytical results (a Beta-energy split and margin-tail diagnostics), explains weak baseline separation in energy and margin terms -- these are not a security theorem. iii) Deny losses and experiments: Modes A--C and extensions, with CIFAR-10 ResNet-18 runs and MNIST ablations for Mode B. We summarize setup and first-order analysis, injectors, absorption, deny losses and ablations, a threat discussion that does not promise cryptography, and closing remarks on scale. Code: \texttt{https://github.com/mindmemory-ai/dksc}
2604.12254.paper_summary_zh: SpanKey 是一種輕量級的方式，用於在不加密權重或追求在 gated inference 上的排行榜準確性下進行推理。這個想法是將激活條件化於秘密金鑰。基礎矩陣 $B$ 定義了一個低維金鑰子空間 $Span(B)$；在訓練過程中，我們抽樣係數 $α$ 並形成金鑰 $k=α^\top B$，然後將它們注入到中間激活中，使用加法或乘法映射和強度 $γ$。有效的金鑰位於 $Span(B)$ 中；無效的金鑰則在該子空間之外抽樣。我們提出三點。 (i) 機制：子空間金鑰注入和多層設計空間。 (ii) 失敗模式：金鑰吸收，連同兩個分析結果（Beta-能量分割和邊際尾部診斷），解釋了在能量和邊際術語中的弱基準分離——這些不是安全定理。 (iii) 否認損失和實驗：模式 A--C 及其擴展，包含 CIFAR-10 ResNet-18 的運行和模式 B 的 MNIST 剝離。我們總結了設置和一階分析、注入器、吸收、否認損失和剝離、威脅討論（不承諾密碼學），以及關於規模的結語。代碼： \texttt{https://github.com/mindmemory-ai/dksc}
2604.12254.author: WenBin Yan et.al.
